calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Placement
Off Calendar Oct-21-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter is called with case number PES-10-293639 (In the matter of Eddy Izarra).

Appearances: Court-Appointed Counsel Christine Del Sherpa for Eddy L. Izarra (Conservatee). Evyn Shomer for the San Francisco Public Guardian (SFPG) (Temporary Conservator). Aleeta Van Runkle (Deputy City Attorney).

The Court stated that the Conservatee was not present and that the Capacity Declaration states that he is unable to appear. Ms. Del Sherpa stated that her client did not wish to appear, that she saw him on Monday, that he has several serious medical problems, and that she believes the conservatorship is needed. The Court stated that a return to the Knox Hotel is not a viable option for the Conservatee noting that he is at Laguna Honda. Ms. Shomer stated that the Conservatee will be transferred to the new building at Laguna Honda. Ms. Del Sherpa stated that the transfer would take place on 12/7/10 or 12/8/10 and that she was happy to hear that because her client did not like the open unit. The Court granted the petition appointing the San Francisco Public Guardian as the Conservator of the Person and Estate of Eddy L. Izarra aka Eddy Lazaro Izarra aka Eddy Lazaro Izarra Fernandez with exclusive medical authority and dementia powers as to medications only (order signed in open court).

Further orders (per written order):
1. Compliance Status Hearing - February 2, 2011, 9:00 a.m., Dept. 204:
2. Assessment Fee - $1200 is charged but deferred.
3. First Account & Status Report - filed one week before January 11, 2012.
4. Status on placement is set for - February 10, 2011, 9:30 a.m, Dept. 204.
5. The status on placement in case number PES-10-293639 is ordered off calendar.
No bond.

Ms. Del Sherpa is to remain on throught the status on placement hearing set for 2/10/11.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Court Investigator: Probate Director Mary Quinn. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR #11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Leonardini.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Placement
Off Calendar Sep-23-2010 Continued To Oct-21-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
